info.title: CNAG: port-knocker utility
info.description: This tool allows to issue "port-knocking" sequence for communicating with programs such as knockd. The tool is very simple and can perform only TCP/SYN knocks.

arguments.name: hostname
arguments.description: The name of the host to port-knock to.
